reasoning: Ali Khamenei is currently still the Supreme Leader of Iran as of December 21, 2025. With only 10 days remaining in the calendar year 2025, the probability of him dying, resigning, or being deposed is incredibly low and effectively limited to the base rate of an 86-year-old dying in a 10-day window (roughly 0.3-0.5%) combined with the small tail risk of a successful assassination or sudden regime collapse.
